hero.title: Custom Software & Automation Solutions
hero.subtitle: For businesses looking to optimize processes and centralize information
hero.description: Custom software development, automation systems, and internal tools to improve workflows, integrate processes, and organize operational data.

highlights.label: Built to grow with the business

problems.title: Problems I Solve
problems.description: Does this sound like your business?

items.title: Manual Data Collection
items.description: Your team manually collects data from multiple sources, spending hours copying, pasting, and consolidating information.

items.title: Data Quality Issues
items.description: Manual entry leads to errors, duplicates, and inconsistencies that cascade through your operations and reporting.

items.title: Disconnected Systems
items.description: Data lives in spreadsheets, emails, and disparate tools. There's no single source of truth.

items.title: Slow Reporting & Insights
items.description: Reports take days to compile and are outdated before you can act on them.

services.title: What I Build
services.description: End-to-end solutions tailored to your operational needs

items.name: Data Automation
items.description: Automated systems that collect, process, and integrate data from multiple sources.

items.name: Internal Applications & Dashboards
items.description: Custom web applications and dashboards that give your team visibility and control over operations.

items.name: Systems & Data Integration
items.description: Connect databases, APIs, and applications to unify processes and eliminate repetitive tasks..

items.name: Intelligent Document Processing
items.description: Automate data extraction and organization from documents and images using OCR and artificial intelligence techniques, reducing manual work and errors.

capabilities.title: Business Domains I Work With
capabilities.description: While I work across industries, I specialize in:

domains.name: Supply Chain & Logistics
domains.description: Order tracking, inventory automation, shipment data integration

domains.name: Reporting & Analytics
domains.description: Business intelligence, KPI dashboards, real-time performance monitoring

domains.name: Quality & Compliance
domains.description: Data validation, error detection, automated compliance reporting

domains.name: Content & Document Management
domains.description: OCR, metadata extraction, document organization and retrieval

capabilities.tech_note: Built with modern tech: Node.js, React, Python, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure—but the technology is always a means to solve your business problem.

webScraper.title: Advanced Web Scraper & Data Automation System
webScraper.subtitle: Real project · Market Data Integration
webScraper.description: Data collection and processing system designed to eliminate manual workflows and improve decision-making.
details: Developed a web scraping solution using Node.js and Puppeteer to collect and centralize market data from multiple sources.
Automated data processing and reporting, significantly reducing the monthly manual effort.
Built a web interface for managing and visualizing data using React and SQL Server.
Designed to support real business use cases with scalable and maintainable architecture.
webScraper.business_impact: In production for a client | Automatic collection of 125+ prices (5 supermarkets × 25 products) | Monthly task reduced from hours to minutes

ocr.title: OCR Label Recognition Prototype
ocr.subtitle: Prototype · Technical Exploration
ocr.description: Prototype system for automated label recognition using computer vision techniques.
details: Developed an OCR solution using Python, OpenCV, and EasyOCR to extract information from product labels.
Implemented image preprocessing techniques to improve text detection accuracy under varying conditions.
Integrated the OCR pipeline into a web-based workflow for data processing and validation.
Explored automation of manual labeling processes to reduce human error and improve efficiency.
ocr.business_impact: Proof of concept with public demo | Explores text extraction with computer vision | Development not finalized

process.title: How I Work
process.description: A straightforward approach to solving your operational challenges

steps.title: Discovery & Audit
steps.description: Understand your current workflows, pain points, data sources, and success metrics.

steps.title: Solution Design
steps.description: Propose a tailored solution with clear scope, timeline, and expected outcomes.

steps.title: Development & Integration
steps.description: Build and integrate with your existing systems. Ongoing communication and transparency.

steps.title: Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Rigorous testing, staff training, and smooth deployment to production.

steps.title: Support & Iteration
steps.description: Post-launch support and continuous optimization based on real-world usage.
